title: Poetry finds you when you're not looking
description: A data scientist who cries at poems. Same curiosity, different tools. Poetry was already in the server room. #Shorts #poetry #selfawareness #writinglife
hook_visual: Close-up of hands typing on a dark terminal screen, then hard cut to the same hands holding an open book in warm light — text overlay fades in: 'Same curiosity. Different tools.'
end_screen_cta: What line has followed you home? Comment below — I read every one.
